outfit_info.outfit_description: A vibrant and cozy layered ensemble features a navy ribbed sweater over a bright red hoodie and a striped shirt, paired with teal corduroy cargo pants. A light blue beanie and brown suede sneakers complete this comfortable, adventure-ready look, ideal for cool weather exploration.

model_attributes.body: A young, slender boy with a healthy complexion, conveying a youthful and energetic presence.
model_attributes.pose: Standing upright, he looks upwards and slightly right, holding a glowing crystal, with a curious and serene expression.
model_attributes.background: A fantastical sky with fluffy clouds, floating islands, and iridescent crystals, creating a whimsical and dreamy atmosphere.
